hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f || exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.css$' || exit 0; npx stylelint "$f"; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f || exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(css|md|html|njk)$' || exit 0; node ./scripts/check-violations.js "$f"; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(md|html|njk)$' || exit 0; node ./scripts/check-html-structure.js "$f"; }
